ddls:
CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "national_office" TEXT /* Name of the national office */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the province */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the province in square kilometers */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the province */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procurement_processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procurement process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the procurement process (e.g., RFQ, Petty Cash) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the procurement process */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the procurement process was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the procurement process was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the procurement process (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procurement_details" (
  "procurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procurement activity */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* ID of the province where the procurement activity took place */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procurement process used */,
  "goods_services" TEXT /* Details of the goods or services procured */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* Name of the service provider */,
  "company_registration" TEXT /* Company registration number of the service provider */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of appointment */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Contract value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the procurement activity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the procurement activity was last updated */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the procurement activity */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the procurement activity was approved */,
  "requisition_number" TEXT /* Unique requisition number for the procurement activity */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., pending, paid, rejected) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL of the document related to the procurement activity (e.g., contract, invoice) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_details_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_details_service_provider FOREIGN KEY ("service_provider") REFERENCES service_providers ("provider_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_details_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_details_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES procurement_processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the service provider */,
  "company_registration" TEXT /* Company registration number of the service provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the service provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the service provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the service provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the service provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the service provider was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the service provider's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., procurement officer, manager, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "procurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procurement activity that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who made the change */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_procurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("procurement_id") REFERENCES procurement_details ("procurement_id")
)
